examples: Cuttlebone can be used as a medicine to stanch bleeding.
The dorsal surface of its cuttlebone is yellowish and evenly convex.
The results show that the chemical component of the cuttlebone is CaCO_3 and the crystal type is aragonite.
Their food in captivity is a mixture of cuttlebone, porridge oats, grass pellets, trout pellets and additional vitamin supplements .
